title: The Journey of Ruth
subtitle: A board game of loyalty, harvest, and redemption
description: Follow Ruth, Naomi, Boaz, and Orpah through the fields of Bethlehem. Collect grain, show kindness, and be the first to reach the City Gate.

cards.title: At the Crossroads
cards.text: Orpah turns back. You press on with courage. Move forward 1 space.
cards.flavour: "Where you go I will go." — Ruth 1:16

cards.title: Crossing Into Judah
cards.text: You arrive in a new land, trusting God's provision. Gain 1 kindness.
cards.flavour: May the Lord reward your faithfulness.

cards.title: Seeking Permission
cards.text: You humbly ask to glean after the harvesters. Gain 2 grain.

cards.title: Morning Gleaning
cards.text: The fields are generous. Gain 3 grain.
cards.flavour: She gleaned in the field until evening.

cards.title: Midday Sun
cards.text: The heat is fierce. You rest in the shade and lose a turn.
cards.flavour: She worked from morning until now.

cards.title: Boaz Speaks
cards.text: "The Lord repay you for what you have done." Gain 2 kindness.
cards.flavour: Boaz notices Ruth's loyalty to Naomi.

cards.title: Drink from the Jar
cards.text: Boaz invites you to drink from the workers' water. Move forward 1.

cards.title: Shared Bread
cards.text: You eat roasted grain with the harvesters. Gain 1 grain and 1 kindness.
cards.flavour: She ate until she was satisfied.

cards.title: Afternoon Abundance
cards.text: Boaz tells the workers to leave extra grain for you. Gain 4 grain.

cards.title: Naomi's Wisdom
cards.text: Naomi guides you toward redemption. Move forward 2 spaces.
cards.flavour: "Wait, my daughter, until you learn how the matter turns out."

cards.title: Threshing Floor
cards.text: You approach Boaz with humility. Gain 2 kindness.

cards.title: Waiting in the Dark
cards.text: You wait patiently through the night. Skip your next turn.

cards.title: Six Measures of Barley
cards.text: Boaz sends you home with six measures. Gain 6 grain.
cards.flavour: "Do not go back to your mother-in-law empty-handed."

cards.title: The Nearer Kinsman
cards.text: The closer relative declines to redeem. Move forward 1.

cards.title: The Sandal Removed
cards.text: The legal transfer is complete. Move forward 1 and gain 1 kindness.
cards.flavour: The ancient custom of confirming a transaction in Israel.

cards.title: Witnesses at the Gate
cards.text: The elders bless your union. Move forward 2.
